_note: Curated registry of x402-priced APIs verified to return a valid 402 challenge. To add an entry, see docs/adding-an-api.md and submit a PR. The verify-seed CI job re-verifies every entry nightly.

entries.name: Executive Producer — local US news search
entries.description: Search local news from US metro markets (DC, Houston, Dallas, etc.) by market, query, or category. Returns curated, deduped, scored stories with hard-fact extraction.

entries.name: Executive Producer — single story detail
entries.description: Fetch one story by ID with full hard-facts, sources, score, and metadata.
